body: Dr. Meera, JIDA Oct 2026, p.14 mein ek interesting study aayi hai. High-risk adult caries ke liye 3-month fluoride varnish recall se recurrence 38% kam dekhi gayi hai. Aapke clinic mein 124 high-risk adults hain—kya main in patients ke liye ek recall message draft karun?
rationale: Sharing a relevant clinical finding from JIDA to help the merchant manage her specific high-risk adult cohort. [anchor=JIDA Oct 2026, p.14, lever=reciprocity(+specificity), trigger=research_digest:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Bharat, aapke clinic ke calls is hafte 50% drop huye hain compared to your baseline of 12. Aapka profile abhi unverified hai aur koi active offers bhi nahi dikh rahe, which might be affecting your CTR. Kya main aapke profile ka ek quick 30-second audit karun to see what's missing?
rationale: Addressing a 50% drop in calls by linking it to the merchant's unverified status and lack of active offers. [anchor=-0.5, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=perf_dip:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Priya, aapka 6_month_cleaning recall due hai. Your last visit was on 2026-05-12, and it's time to ensure your oral hygiene is on track. Humne aapke liye evening slots block kiye hain. Reply 1 for Wed 5 Nov, 6pm, 2 for Thu 6 Nov, 5pm, or tell us a time that works for you. - Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic
rationale: Priya is a repeat patient due for her 6-month cleaning; using Hinglish and her preferred weekday evening slots to drive re-booking. [anchor=2026-05-12, lever=loss_aversion(+binary_commitment), trigger=recall_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Bharat, aapka Pro plan 12 days mein expire ho raha hai. Last 30 days mein Bharat Dental Care profile par 980 views aur 18 directions aaye hain. Renewal ke baad hum aapke 95 lapsed patients ko reach out karne ka plan set kar sakte hain to improve your 0.18 retention rate. Kya main next month ka growth plan share karoon?
rationale: Using loss aversion by highlighting the 12-day window and specific visibility metrics (980 views) to justify the renewal. [anchor=12, lever=loss_aversion(+specificity), trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Meera, DCI circular 2026-11-04 ke according IOPA dose limits change ho rahe hain. 2026-12-15 se maximum dose 1.0 mSv limit hogi, jisme E-speed film toh pass ho jayegi par D-speed nahi. Aapka RVG setup hai ya film-based? Agar audit checklist chahiye toh batayein.
rationale: Alerting the merchant to a specific DCI compliance deadline regarding radiograph dose limits to ensure clinical standards are met. [anchor=2026-12-15, lever=loss_aversion(+effort_externalization), trigger=regulation_change:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Meera, aapke clinic se 1.3 km door Smile Studio open hua hai and they are offering Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Aapka current CTR 0.021 hai, which is slightly below the peer median of 0.03. Since aapka cleaning offer ₹299 par hai, we might need to highlight your patient experience to stay competitive. Want a 1-pager comparing your listing to theirs?
rationale: Alerting the merchant to a nearby competitor's lower price point while grounding the advice in her current CTR performance. [anchor=1.3, lever=loss_aversion+reciprocity, trigger=competitor_opened:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Pooja, Bend & Burn ka performance kaafi solid hai with 5934 views this month. Maine ek naya trend notice kiya: 30-50 age group mein Personal Training inquiries 38% YoY badh gayi hain. Since aap Koramangala mein hain, this corporate cohort is a big opportunity. Kya main aapke liye ek '2x/week PT @ ₹3,499' package ka draft ready karun to capture this demand?
rationale: Leveraging the PT demand trend from the digest to suggest a specific corporate-friendly package for a high-performing Bangalore gym. [anchor=5934, lever=reciprocity+curiosity, trigger=research_digest:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Akash, Fit Republic ki profile par pichle 30 days mein 3185 views aaye hain, par calls sirf 7 hain. Gachibowli ke average CTR 0.045 ke muqable aapka CTR 0.019 kaafi low hai. Profile par photos ya offers update karke footfall badhaya ja sakta hai. Want me to do a quick 30-sec audit to see what's missing?
rationale: The merchant has a low CTR (0.019) compared to the peer average (0.045) despite high views, suggesting a conversion issue. [anchor=0.019, lever=loss_aversion+reciprocity, trigger=perf_dip:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Rashmi, PowerHouse Fitness here. It's been 57 days since your last visit. To help you get back on track with your weight loss goals, we've kept 3 FREE Trial Classes ready for you. Reply YES to claim them.
rationale: Re-engaging a hard-lapsed member by using the exact inactivity duration and their specific fitness goal to offer a low-friction way back. [anchor=57, lever=reciprocity(+loss_aversion), trigger=customer_lapsed_hard:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Padma, Zen Yoga Studio ke calls 15% badh gaye hain pichle 7 days mein. It looks like the kids yoga post is working well. Aapne kuch aur change kiya hai kya last week? Would love to know what's driving this footfall.
rationale: Celebrating a 15% spike in calls likely driven by the kids yoga post to encourage the merchant to keep up the momentum. [anchor=0.15, lever=reciprocity(+asking), trigger=perf_spike:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Pooja, Aug-Oct wedding and festival window start hone wala hai and clients usually shape up mode mein aa jate hain. Bend & Burn ke liye retention focus ka sahi time hai as we enter this high-demand phase. Aapke 387 unique customers ko re-engage karne ke liye ek special 'Refer-a-friend' offer draft karun?
rationale: Leveraging the seasonal beat of Aug-Oct festival window to drive retention for the merchant's existing customer base. [anchor=387, lever=specificity(+curiosity), trigger=festival_upcoming:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Karan, Iron Forge Fitness ka Pro subscription 85 days mein expire ho raha hai. Pichle 30 days mein aapne 2055 views aur 23 calls generate kiye hain magicpin se. Footfall aur leads maintain rakhne ke liye renewal process abhi check kar lein? Want me to walk through what's queued for next month?
rationale: Reminding the merchant of their upcoming renewal by highlighting the tangible value (views and calls) they received in the last 30 days. [anchor=2055, lever=loss_aversion+specificity, trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Bharti ji, Wellness Cart ke views is hafte 23.0% down hain, but summer demand shift par ek useful update hai. Multi-pharmacy aggregate Apr 2026 ke according, ORS aur sunscreen ki demand 40% badh gayi hai. Aap counter visibility change karke in items ko front par rakh sakte hain. Kya main aapke customers ke liye ek summer-care reminder draft karun?
rationale: Leveraging seasonal demand shift data to provide actionable merchandising advice during a traffic dip. [anchor=-23.0%, lever=reciprocity(+curiosity), trigger=research_digest:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Anil ji, Healthwell Pharmacy ke profile views is hafte 23.0% niche gaye hain. Halaki calls 28% up hain, par views drop hone se naye customers kam ho sakte hain. Summer demand shift ki wajah se ORS aur sunscreen ki search badh rahi hai—kya main aapka profile in items ke liye optimize kar doon?
rationale: Noticed a significant dip in views and used the summer demand trend from the digest to offer a specific optimization fix. [anchor=-23.0%, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=perf_dip:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: नमस्ते Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy से रमेश बात कर रहा हूँ। आपकी Metformin और Atorvastatin की दवाइयां 28 April को खत्म हो रही हैं। हमने आपका स्टॉक अलग रख दिया है। क्या हम कल सुबह morning delivery के लिए भेज दें? Senior Citizen 15% OFF के साथ ₹499 से ऊपर delivery free है।
rationale: Targeting a senior chronic patient for a timely refill using his preferred delivery slot and applicable discounts to ensure continuity of care. [anchor=2026-03-26, lever=reciprocity(+loss_aversion), trigger=chronic_refill_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Vikas ji, festival season mein sweets ki wajah se blood sugar spikes kaafi common ho jaate hain. Sunrise Medicos par aapka chronic_rx_count abhi 60 hai—kya hum diabetic monitoring kits ya refills ke liye ek special reminder set karein? Gomti Nagar ke patients ke liye kaafi useful rahega.
rationale: Leveraging the seasonal blood sugar spike trend to engage the merchant on their existing chronic patient base. [anchor=60, lever=specificity+curiosity, trigger=festival_upcoming:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Ramesh ji, CDSCO alert ke mutabik atorvastatin ke batches AT2024-1102 aur AT2024-1108 recall huye hain sub-potency ki wajah se. Aapke 240 chronic Rx customers mein se kuch is molecule par ho sakte hain. In batches ko shelf se hata kar distributor return process start kar dena chahiye. Kya main aapke liye affected customers ki list filter kar doon?
rationale: Providing specific batch numbers for a medical recall to ensure compliance and patient safety. [anchor=AT2024-1102, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=supply_alert:u5, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Vinod ji, Family Health Pharmacy ka trial 5 days mein end ho raha hai. Pichle 30 days mein aapne 5870 views aur 12 calls generate kiye hain magicpin se. In leads aur visibility ko continue rakhne ke liye subscription renew karein. Kya main aapko next month ke plans share karoon?
rationale: Using loss aversion by highlighting the 5870 views and 12 calls generated during the trial period which ends in 5 days. [anchor=5, lever=loss_aversion+specificity, trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Suresh, corporate bulk thali package ke liye hum aapka existing Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 use kar sakte hain. Indiranagar ke office groups ke liye isme ek sweet add karke bulk pricing set kar dein? Aapka thali quality feedback kaafi positive hai, so it should work well. Bolen toh draft share karun?
rationale: Continuing the corporate thali planning thread by suggesting a bulk version of their high-performing ₹149 thali. [anchor=corporate_bulk_thali_package, lever=effort_externalization, trigger=active_planning_intent:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Karim, quick one — aapke calls 10.0% badh gaye hain last 7 days mein. Kabab Junction team ne kuch naya try kiya kya last week? Just wanted to see if we can repeat that success this weekend.
rationale: Celebrating a 10% call volume increase to build rapport and identify successful local tactics. [anchor=+10.0%, lever=reciprocity(+asking), trigger=perf_spike:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Dipti, we're looking forward to seeing you tomorrow for your family brunch! We've blocked your table at Mylari South Indian Cafe. Please reply YES to confirm your visit or let us know if you need to reschedule.
rationale: Confirming a lapsed customer's brunch booking to ensure table turnover and reduce no-shows. [anchor=family_brunch, lever=binary_commitment, trigger=appointment_tomorrow:u2, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Suresh, SK Pizza Junction ke reviews mein ek pattern dikh raha hai. Last 30 days mein 4 customers ne delivery_late mention kiya hai, aur ek ne likha: "took 50 mins for a 15 min ride". Delivery orders aapka major chunk hain (180 last month), toh kya aap chahte hain main in reviews ke liye ek polite response template draft karun?
rationale: Notifying the merchant about a rising negative review theme using a specific customer quote to drive engagement and service recovery. [anchor=took 50 mins for a 15 min ride, lever=reciprocity, trigger=review_theme_emerged:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Suresh, aaj Delhi mein DC vs MI match hai at Arun Jaitley Stadium. Usually Saturday matches pe dine-in covers thode kam rehte hain as people order in. Aapka pizza quality feedback kaafi positive hai, toh kya aaj ke liye ek delivery-special match combo draft karun?
rationale: Leveraging the local IPL match to suggest a delivery-focused pivot, as Saturday matches typically see a dip in dine-in covers according to the digest. [anchor=DC vs MI, lever=specificity(+curiosity), trigger=ipl_match_today:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Suresh, quick update — Mylari South Indian Cafe abhi 145 reviews par hai. Aap 150 reviews ka milestone hit karne ke kaafi close hain, which is great for Indiranagar footfall. Aapka Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 kaafi positive feedback la raha hai. Kya main ek short post draft karun to help you cross that 150 mark this week?
rationale: Celebrating the imminent 150-review milestone to build momentum and leverage the successful thali offer. [anchor=150, lever=reciprocity(+social_proof), trigger=milestone_reached:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Karim, Alambagh mein abhi summer hair-care surge start ho raha hai. Ek interesting trend dekha — salons that add 'walk-in available' to their description are seeing 23% higher call volume in metros. Aapke calls already 23.0% up hain this week, so this small tweak could help even more. Kya main aapke profile description mein ye add kar doon?
rationale: Leveraging the walk-in trend from the digest to build on the merchant's current positive call momentum. [anchor=23%, lever=reciprocity(+curiosity), trigger=research_digest:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Sushma, The Beauty Bar ke views 2547 touch kar rahe hain, but calls abhi bhi 22 par hi hain. Baner mein 'walk-in available' tag use karne se call volume 23% tak badh sakta hai. Kya main aapka profile audit karke check karun ki kahan gap aa raha hai?
rationale: Merchant has high views but low calls compared to peer averages; suggesting the walk-in tag trend to convert views to calls. [anchor=2547, lever=reciprocity, trigger=perf_dip:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Saanvi! It's been a month since your last visit on 2026-04-01. Summer heat is here, so it's the perfect time for a relaxing hair spa or facial to keep your skin and hair healthy. Humne aapke liye slots open rakhe hain. Would you like to book an appointment for this week? Reply YES to confirm.
rationale: The customer is due for a monthly recall since her last visit was on April 1st. Using the summer hair-care surge trend to encourage a booking. [anchor=2026-04-01, lever=loss_aversion, trigger=recall_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Lakshmi, Diwali is still 188 days away, but the secondary bridal window for April-May is starting now. Since Priya is already getting great reviews for balayage, would you like to run a Bridal Trial @ ₹999 to capture this early summer surge?
rationale: Skipping the distant Diwali trigger to focus on the immediate April-May bridal window mentioned in seasonal beats, leveraging positive reviews for a specific stylist. [anchor=188, lever=specificity+curiosity, trigger=festival_upcoming:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1]

body: Hi Paras, aapka subscription expire ho gaya hai. Last 30 days mein Paras Hair & Beauty ne 4171 views aur 20 leads generate kiye hain. Aap nahi chahenge ki ye momentum break ho, especially jab views 18.0% up hain. Want me to walk through what's queued for next month?
rationale: Using loss aversion by highlighting the 4171 views and 20 leads the merchant is currently getting while their subscription is expired. [anchor=4171, lever=loss_aversion, trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Renu, Gomti Nagar mein aapke salon ke views 4% up hain, par calls mein 18% dip dikh raha hai. I noticed a new theme emerging in your recent reviews. Kya aap chahte hain main saare reviews summarize karke ek response template draft kar doon?
rationale: Noticed a review theme while calls are dipping; offering a summary to help the merchant engage better. [anchor=-18.0, lever=reciprocity+curiosity, trigger=review_theme_emerged:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]
